types: Content you create (posts, photos, videos, comments)
Activity data (likes, clicks, searches, pages visited)
data_collected.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

sold_to_third_parties.source_quote: Meta does not sell user data; however, it shares advertiser information with third parties

shared_for_advertising.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy. Meta shares audience segments with advertisers.

cross_site_tracking.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Meta tracks users across websites via Meta Pixel and off-Facebook activity

used_for_profiling.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Meta creates detailed user profiles for ad targeting

used_to_train_ai.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Meta uses user data to train AI models

third_party_recipients.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

retention_period.value: Data retained until account deletion; some data retained longer for legal/business purposes
retention_period.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

access_your_data.source_quote: Users can download their data via Facebook Download Your Information tool

delete_your_data.source_quote: Users can delete individual content or request account deletion

correct_inaccuracies.source_quote: Users can edit their profile information and correct data

opt_out_of_sale_sharing.source_quote: Meta does not sell data, so no sale opt-out; advertising cannot be fully disabled

data_portability.source_quote: Download Your Information tool allows data portability

appeal_decisions.source_quote: Users can appeal content moderation and ad account decisions via Meta's appeal system

encrypted_in_transit.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — HTTPS encryption for data in transit

encrypted_at_rest.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — encryption at rest is standard practice

mfa_available.source_quote: Two-factor authentication available via authenticator apps and text

breach_notification.source_quote: Meta notifies users of security incidents as required by law

independent_audits.source_quote: Meta undergoes SOC 2 and other third-party security audits

honors_gpc.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Meta does not honor Global Privacy Control signals

honors_dnt.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Meta does not honor Do Not Track signals

childrens_privacy.notes: Facebook complies with COPPA for users under 13, though the platform is intended for 13+. Additional parental controls available.
childrens_privacy.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

gaps: Specific data retention timelines for different data types not clearly stated
Detailed list of all third-party recipients not publicly available
Specific security certifications and audit frequencies not disclosed
Partial transparency on AI training data usage
label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Meta's privacy policy is extensive but intentionally vague about third-party sharing and data usage. The company does not sell personal data directly but shares sophisticated audience segments with advertisers. Data practices focused on ad targeting and service improvement. Updated with available information as of knowledge cutoff Feb 2025.
